title: TRANS CLINIC - 211info
text: OUTSIDE IN TRANS CLINIC Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides health care, safer sex supplies, HIV/STD testing, and hormone therapy. Hormone Replacement Therapy provided on an informed consent model. 1132 SW 13th Avenue Portland, OR 97205 Eligibility: Individuals who identify as transgender, gender queer, queer, and questioning Hours: Monday/Thursday/Friday 8:30am-5pm, Tuesday-Wednesday 8:30am-7pm. Closed until 10am on the 2nd Tuesday of the month. Email (503) 535-3828 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 535-3828 Trans Clinic Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for appointment FEES: Sliding scale, no one is refused service for inability to pay DOCUMENTS: Proof of income if applying for sliding scale fees LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Clackamas, Multnomah, and Washington Counties SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8:30am-5pm Services: General Medical Care * Transgender Individuals HIV Testing * Transgender Individuals Sexually Transmitted Infection Screening * Transgender Individuals Transgender Hormone Therapy Other Services Offered At This Location: HEALTH SCREENING/DIAGNOSTIC SERVICES - SCREENWISE-ENROLLING HOUSING/SHELTER - OUTSIDE IN DAY PROGRAM HOUSING/SHELTER - YOUTH HOUSING PROGRAM HUMAN REPRODUCTION - OREGON CONTRACEPTIVE CARE LEGAL SERVICES - ID PROJECT OUTPATIENT HEALTH FACILITIES - MEDICAL CLINIC If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
